title: Temporary workers: Eligibility and admissibility - Canada.ca
content:
## Temporary workers: Eligibility and admissibility
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.
- Temporary Foreign Workers Program and International Mobility Program: Steps to determine work and assessment of work permit application
- Language requirements
- Immigration warrants
- Work permit issuance prohibitions
- Employer-specific work permits with Labour Market Impact Assessment exemptions
- Public list of employers who have been non-compliant
- Conditions of the work permit including validity period
- Assessing medical requirements
- Urgent referrals process for work permits
- Temporary Foreign Worker Program: Quebec cases
- Additional information to consider under sections A34 to 37
